title: Cold-Active Enzyme from Glaciozyma antarctica PI12: In Silico Approach
author: Adamu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The input files, structures and datasets utilized to generate the computational results featured in the manuscript titled "Low Temperature Adaptation of Cold-Active Lipase from  Glaciozyma antarctica  PI12: Insights from Alphafold2 Prediction and Molecular Dynamics Simulation". For further elaboration and specific information, kindly refer to the publication. This research was made possible with the generous support of the Universiti Putra Malaysia.
